# Rustic loop-control showcase programs.
let n = 0; let total = 0; while n < 10 { n = n + 1; if n == 4 { break; } else { total = total + n; } }; total => 6
let n = 0; let total = 0; while n < 5 { n = n + 1; if n == 3 { continue; } else { total = total + n; } }; total => 12
let n = 0; let x = 0; while n < 3 { n = n + 1; if n == 2 { continue; } else { 0 }; x = x + 10; }; x => 20
let n = 0; let x = 0; while n < 3 { n = n + 1; if n == 2 { break; } else { 0 }; x = x + 10; }; x => 10
let n = 0; let found = 0; while n < 8 { n = n + 1; if found == 1 { continue; } else { if n % 4 == 0 { found = n; break; } else { 0 } } }; found => 4
